article.title: Uber Interview
article.content: Recently I had a Interview with Uber. I was this question https://leetcode.com/problems/longest-continuous-subarray-with-absolute-diff-less-than-or-equal-to-limit/description/, It was not a very famous question so I never practiced it. But after putting efforts and enery I came up with O(NlogN) using a TreeMap. I coded the solution, but there was a bug and I was out of time. I would like to know is there any chances I can make through it. I tried the same logic after the interviews and It was accepted. Please help me out.\n\n

post.content:
Look buddy, in order to clear SDE interview at Uber (L3/L4) we need to have majority positives and Uber gives high weightage to Coding1 and Coding2 rounds, and a non-execution code is often given a non-positive feedback. 
As you are expected to come-up with a running solution for a medium level problem asked in a Coding1/2 interview. 

What was the result ?
